ddls:
CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kingdom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phyla" (
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phylum */,
  "phylum_name" TEXT /* Name of the phylum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phylum */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Kingdom of the phylum (Foreign key referencing kingdoms table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phylum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "phylum_id" INTEGER /* Phylum of the class (Foreign key referencing phyla table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of the order (Foreign key referencing classes table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order of the family (Foreign key referencing orders table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Family of the genus (Foreign key referencing families table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Genus of the species (Foreign key referencing genera table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "microorganism1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first microorganism */,
  "microorganism2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second microorganism */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_microorganism2_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism2_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_microorganism1_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism1_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effects_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microorganism_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microorganism_versions_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microorganism_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microorganism_tags_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microorganism_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microorganism_categories_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microorganism_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "microorganism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microorganism */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microorganism_comments_microorganism_id FOREIGN KEY ("microorganism_id") REFERENCES microorganisms ("microorganism_id")
)
